description: Test cases for KWDB Text-to-SQL conversion with MCP integration support

evals.name: downsampling-basic
evals.prompt: Show me the hourly average temperature for each device in the last 24 hours. Table: sensor_data, columns: ts (timestamp), device_id (tag), temperature (measurement)
evals.expected_output: SQL with time_bucket function, GROUP BY device_id, WHERE clause for last 24 hours

assertions.text: WHERE clause filters to last 24 hours (NOW() - INTERVAL or similar)

evals.name: downsampling-template
evals.prompt: Calculate the daily total of energy consumption for all meters
evals.expected_output: SQL template with time_bucket, placeholders for missing table structure

assertions.text: Uses time_bucket with daily interval ('1d' or '1 day')
Contains placeholders or template markers for missing table/column names

evals.name: interpolation-linear
evals.prompt: Fill missing temperature values using linear interpolation for the past week
evals.expected_output: SQL with time_bucket_gapfill and interpolate function with 'linear' mode

assertions.text: Filters to past week (NOW() - INTERVAL '7 day' or similar)

evals.name: interpolation-prev
evals.prompt: I need to fill gaps in my pressure readings with the previous value for the last month
evals.expected_output: SQL with time_bucket_gapfill and interpolate function with PREV mode

assertions.text: Filters to last month (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' or similar)

evals.name: latest-value-per-device
evals.prompt: Get the latest temperature reading for each device in my sensor network
evals.expected_output: SQL with last() function and GROUP BY device_id

assertions.text: Includes last(ts) or timestamp column for time reference

evals.name: aggregation-complex
evals.prompt: Calculate min, max, and average humidity for every 15-minute interval grouped by location
evals.expected_output: SQL with time_bucket, multiple aggregate functions, GROUP BY time bucket and location

assertions.text: Uses min(), max(), and avg() aggregate functions on humidity
Uses GROUP BY with both time bucket and location

evals.name: cross-model-join
evals.prompt: Join the devices table with sensor_data to get device names along with their latest readings
evals.expected_output: SQL with JOIN between relational table and time-series subquery, using last() function

assertions.text: Uses JOIN between devices and sensor_data
Uses subquery with last() aggregation for time-series data
Joins on device_id or equivalent key

evals.name: window-function-event
evals.prompt: Detect temperature anomaly events where readings exceed 100 degrees, segmenting the data by when the condition starts and ends
evals.expected_output: SQL with EVENT_WINDOW function using temperature conditions

assertions.text: Start condition checks temperature > 100 or equivalent

evals.name: session-window
evals.prompt: Group sensor readings into sessions where data gaps are less than 5 minutes apart
evals.expected_output: SQL with SESSION_WINDOW function using 5 minute threshold

assertions.text: Uses 5 minute interval ('5m') as gap threshold
Uses GROUP BY session and entity

evals.name: time-weighted-average
evals.prompt: Calculate the time-weighted average temperature for each hour
evals.expected_output: SQL with TWA function combined with time_bucket

evals.name: downsampling-chinese
evals.prompt: 查询最近24小时每小时的平均温度
evals.expected_output: 应生成使用 time_bucket(ts, '1h') 和 avg(temperature) 的 SQL，带有 WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hour' 条件

evals.name: interpolation-chinese
evals.prompt: 填充缺失的湿度数据，使用线性插值
evals.expected_output: 应生成使用 time_bucket_gapfill() 和 interpolate(avg(humidity), 'linear') 的 SQL

evals.name: latest-value-chinese
evals.prompt: 获取每个设备最新的一条温度记录
evals.expected_output: 应生成使用 last(temperature) 或 ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 的 SQL，带有 GROUP BY device_id

assertions.text: Uses last() function for temperature (preferred) or ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

evals.name: aggregation-filter-chinese
evals.prompt: 查询设备温度大于35度的记录，并按天统计数量
evals.expected_output: 应生成使用 time_bucket(ts, '1d') 进行分组，WHERE temperature > 35 条件，并使用 count(*) 聚合

evals.name: cross-model-chinese
evals.prompt: 我有一个 sensors 表，包含 ts 时间戳、temperature 和 humidity 列，还有一个 devices 表包含 device_id 和 device_name，如何查询每个设备的最新温度并显示设备名称？
evals.expected_output: 应生成跨模查询 SQL，使用 JOIN 连接两个表，查询最新温度数据

assertions.text: Uses JOIN between sensors and devices tables
Uses last() or last_row() for latest temperature

evals.name: mcp-detect-and-discover
evals.prompt: Query the average temperature for each device in the last 24 hours. Database: iot_db, MCP is available.
evals.expected_output: Skill should detect MCP, read kwdb://db_info/iot_db to discover tables, identify sensor_data table, read kwdb://table/sensor_data for schema, then generate SQL with verified column names

assertions.text: Uses verified column names in SQL

evals.name: mcp-multi-table-disambiguation
evals.prompt: 查询设备数据，数据库中有 device_info、sensor_data、device_log 三个表
evals.expected_output: Skill should list candidate tables and ask user to confirm which table to use

evals.name: mcp-fallback-no-schema
evals.prompt: 查询最近24小时的平均温度，MCP 不可用
evals.expected_output: Skill should ask user to provide schema or use assumed field names

evals.name: mcp-database-name-missing
evals.prompt: 帮我查询最近24小时的传感器数据（数据库名未知）
evals.expected_output: Skill should ask user for database name

assertions.text: Does not attempt to read kwdb://db_info without a database name

evals.name: disambiguation-time-series-vs-relational
evals.prompt: 查询温度大于30度的记录
evals.expected_output: Skill should use disambiguation to determine if this is a time-series or relational query, ask user to clarify if ambiguous

assertions.text: Mentions ambiguity (time-series vs relational) in output
Either asks user to clarify or makes a reasonable assumption based on schema
